india_trends.title: Can Shree Cement, Ambuja's capex breather allay sector’s overcapacity concerns?
india_trends.summary: Pan-India average cement prices improved by ₹10-13 per bag month-on-month in May as companies attempted price hikes to partially offset the cost inflation arising due to the West Asia crisis

india_trends.title: Small-cap stock under ₹100 MIC Electronics zooms 9% despite weak trends on Dalal Street
india_trends.summary: MIC Electronics share price has fallen 20% this year so far, and has declined over 42% in six months. The smallcap stock has dropped 33% in one year, and has plunged 22% in two years. MIC Electronics shares have delivered multibagger returns of 167% in three years.

india_trends.title: CarTrade Tech shares extend rally for second session after Q4 earnings, up 5% today
india_trends.summary: Rally comes after CarTrade Tech reported a 64% y-o-y rise in standalone net profit for the quarter ended March 2026 at ₹35.17 crore

india_trends.title: Hero Motocorp vs Bajaj Auto: Which is a better stock to buy after Q4 results 2026?
india_trends.summary: Q4 results 2026: Experts believe, both Bajaj Auto and Hero MotoCorp delivered strong Q4 results, but Bajaj Auto appears relatively better positioned for superior long-term wealth creation

india_trends.title: Multibagger defence stock Apollo Micro Systems jumps 7% after this order book update
india_trends.summary: Apollo Micro Systems shares rose over 7% on May 8 after announcing new orders totaling ₹51.02 crore. The contracts include ₹17.47 crore from the Ministry of Defence and others from public and private sectors, enhancing investor confidence in the defence and aerospace market.

india_trends.title: No AI, poor returns drive Dalal Street investors to foreign markets
india_trends.summary: Indian investors are increasingly shifting money overseas in search of diversification amid weaker domestic market returns, persistent foreign fund outflows, and a record-low rupee. Overseas investments in equities and debt rose 60% year-on-year to over $2.2 billion in the 11 months through February

india_trends.title: SBI Q4 preview: Strong loan growth, stable margins may cushion margins
india_trends.summary: Analysts expect India’s largest lender to continue outperforming peers on loan growth and net interest margin (NIM) stability, even as higher bond yields weigh on treasury gains during the January-March quarter

india_trends.title: OnEMI Technology Solutions shares jump 23% over IPO price on debut
india_trends.summary: The stock opened at ₹190 on the NSE, an 11% premium over the IPO price of ₹171, and debuted at ₹191 on the BSE, up 11.6%; It later reached an intraday high of ₹210.80, a gain of over 23% from the offer price

india_trends.title: Krystal Integrated Services posts 5% revenue growth in FY26, PAT jumps 11% in Q4
india_trends.summary: The Mumbai-based integrated facility management company posted a net profit of ₹18.849 crore in Q4 FY26, up 11.31 per cent from ₹16.933 crore in Q4 FY25

india_trends.title: AI boom masks rising global energy risks, warns David Roche
india_trends.summary: Market veterans warn investors may be underestimating the long-term economic fallout from the Middle East energy crisis. While AI spending and US economic resilience fuel optimism, falling oil reserves and tightening supplies could lead to shortages and a significant global GDP contraction. Rising s

india_trends.title: SBI Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Net profit may rise 4% despite treasury pain, NII seen up 8% YoY; dividend in focus
india_trends.summary: SBI Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: SBI is expected to report muted earnings growth in the fourth quarter of FY26, weighed down by treasury losses. Margins and asset quality of the PSU bank is expected remain largely stable.

india_trends.title: Shell’s Profit Surge: How Iran Tensions Powered Q1 Earnings
india_trends.summary: Shell reported its strongest quarterly profit in nearly two years, driven by gains in refining and energy trading amid Iran-related geopolitical tensions. While earnings beat expectations and shareholder payouts increased, concerns over declining production and sustainability of trading gains weighe

india_trends.title: BSE share price target rises up to Rs 4,570 after Q4 results. What Jefferies, Motilal Oswal & others are saying?
india_trends.summary: BSE shares dipped despite a strong March quarter performance, with net profit soaring 61% YoY to Rs 797 crore and revenue jumping 85% to Rs 1,564 crore. Analysts remain divided, with Nuvama maintaining a 'Buy' rating and Jefferies a 'Hold', citing varying growth prospects and risks.
